backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining Order, DesignMapping, and Karigar types with CRUD operations for orders, karigars, and design mappings, including supply, hallmark, and status transition logic. Uses migration and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state (which included designImages and masterDesignExcel blob fields) into the new actor state shape by dropping those blob fields.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three implemented features: restoring karigar PDF export layout, fixing karigar name sync across tabs, and fixing desktop sidebar/content overlap layout.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated summary document describing the purpose and key changes of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA, setting viewport meta, favicon, page title, and mounting the root div with the main.tsx module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app configuring TanStack Router with a Layout component (SidebarProvider + AppSidebar + SidebarInset) and all application routes, wrapped in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Custom: Dashboard tab that filters and displays CO-type pending orders with a search input supporting order number, design code, and generic name filtering.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Design: A modal dialog component that fetches and displays a design image by design code, supporting zoom and pan interactions via mouse and touch events.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Hallma: A dashboard tab that displays orders in 'Hallmark' status grouped by design, with filtering, bulk selection, status update to 'ReturnFromHallmark', and export (JPEG/PDF) functionality.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Kariga: A dashboard tab that groups pending orders by karigar (artisan) name using master design mappings and displays summary cards with navigation to individual karigar detail pages.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/OrderT: A reusable table component for displaying orders with support for bulk selection, marking orders as ready, deleting orders, and exporting to Excel, PDF, or JPEG formats.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/ReadyT: A dashboard tab that displays orders in 'Ready' status grouped by design, with search filtering, bulk selection, marking orders back as pending, and export (JPEG/PDF) functionality.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Summar: Displays a grid of 4 summary metric cards (order count, weight, quantity, CO count) that update based on the active dashboard tab (total, ready, hallmark, customer, karigars).
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Suppli: A dialog for batch-supplying RB orders, allowing users to set a supplied quantity (≤ original) per order, with partial supply warnings and mutation on confirm.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/TotalO: Renders a searchable, grouped-by-design list of pending orders with checkboxes for bulk actions (mark ready, supply, delete) and a design image preview modal.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Unmapp: Shows a destructive alert listing design codes that are missing generic or karigar name mappings, with navigation buttons to the unmapped orders and master designs pages.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppSideba: Application sidebar with navigation menu items for all major routes and a Data Reset option that opens a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/layout/DataReset: A confirmation alert dialog that permanently deletes all active (Pending, Ready, Return from Hallmark) orders via the resetActiveOrders mutation.
frontend/src/components/masterdesigns/Ed: A modal dialog component that allows reassigning a design code to a different karigar (artisan), supporting both selecting an existing karigar from a dropdown and adding a new one, with cache invalidation on save.
frontend/src/components/tagprinting/Webv: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the backend actor, covering orders, design mappings, karigars, and blob storage operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties using OKLCH color values for the design system, including colors for UI elements, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/AgeingStock.tsx: A page component that displays pending orders grouped by design code with color-coded age bands (green/yellow/red based on days since order date), supporting bulk selection and marking orders as ready.
frontend/src/pages/BarcodeScanning.tsx: A barcode scanning page that supports both hardware scanner (keyboard buffer) and camera-based QR scanning, accumulating scanned order IDs and allowing batch status updates via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: The main dashboard page displaying summary cards and tabbed views (Total Orders, Ready, Hallmark, Customer Orders, Karigars) populated from a global orders query.
frontend/src/pages/DesignImages.tsx: A page for uploading design images either from a folder or a ZIP file, extracting filenames as design codes and storing images via an ExternalBlob platform API.
frontend/src/pages/IngestOrders.tsx: A page for uploading an Excel file of orders, parsing it with a utility, and sequentially saving each order to the backend canister actor with error tracking.
frontend/src/pages/KarigarDetail.tsx: A detail page for a specific karigar showing their assigned orders grouped by design code, with support for PDF export (including design images) and a supplied-quantity dialog.
frontend/src/pages/MasterDesigns.tsx: A page for managing master design-to-karigar mappings, supporting Excel upload to bulk-import mappings and an editable table with search and inline edit modal.
frontend/src/pages/Reconciliation.tsx: React page for reconciling a master Excel file against existing orders, parsing rows (including order type, karigar, weight, date) and persisting matched master data rows via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/TagPrinting.tsx: React page that displays ready orders grouped by design code with date-range filtering, checkbox selection, clipboard copy of order numbers, and a hallmark confirmation dialog before updating design group status.
frontend/src/pages/UnmappedCodes.tsx: React page that lists orders missing generic name or karigar mappings, grouped by design code, with inline editing to update or reassign design mappings via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/utils/ageingBadge.tsx: Utility component that renders a color-coded badge showing how many days ago an order was placed, using green/amber/red thresholds at 14 and 29 days.
frontend/src/utils/excelParser.ts: Utility module that dynamically loads SheetJS from CDN and parses an Excel file into an array of ParsedOrder objects, normalizing headers, design codes, order types, and date serials.
frontend/src/utils/exportUtils.ts: Utility module providing Excel export (via SheetJS CDN with CSV fallback) and a pure client-side PDF export that generates one page per order with key order details.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining dark mode, content paths, custom fonts (Inter, Playfair Display), OKLCH-based color tokens (primary, sidebar, chart, gold, etc.), border radius, and plugins (typography, container-queries, animate).
project_state.json: Project state descriptor for the Jewellery Order Manager app, documenting three known issues to fix: karigar PDF export format, karigar name sync across tabs, and desktop sidebar/content overlap, along with existing feature definitions and architectural notes.
